_comment: WDM dungeon-map patches. Hosted from Trimitor's own releases rather than copied into this repo: 66 MB of binaries would bloat git history permanently, and upstream is the legitimate distribution point. Tags are pinned so a new upstream release cannot change what players get without us deciding to move.
The -N archive only ships in beta tags upstream; it is the optional Caverns and Mines (microdungeons) expansion.
